overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence through a desert wasteland in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a vehicle journey from a small settlement past power lines and solar panel arrays toward a distant neon-lit city. The footage showcases industrial decay and cyberpunk aesthetics with moody blue-green lighting.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle departs from a desert settlement edge, passing by industrial buildings with glowing windows and a group of figures near a fence. Street lights illuminate the immediate area before giving way to the dark open desert ahead.

segments.scene_description: Driving through open desert darkness with power transmission towers lining the left side of the road. Distant city lights emerge on the horizon, and the vehicle follows another car with glowing red taillights.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a solar farm with massive elevated panel arrays lining both sides of the road. The driver follows a lead vehicle through the industrial installation while the distant city lights shift to the right side of the frame.

segments.scene_description: Passing through an abandoned desert outpost with a small illuminated building and wrecked vehicles. The vehicle leaves the solar farm behind and continues into the open desert toward the distant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the edge of a dim desert settlement into a vast industrial wasteland leading toward a distant neon city. It begins by departing a small cluster of industrial buildings with glowing windows and figures by a fence, moving from the reach of street lights into the oppressive darkness of the open desert. As the vehicle follows the red taillights of another car, the landscape shifts to a corridor of towering power transmission lines while city lights first emerge on the horizon. The scene then expands into a massive solar farm with elevated panel arrays lining both sides of the road, before passing through a desolate outpost marked by a single illuminated building and rusted wreckage. Finally, the camera leaves the industrial installations behind, accelerating back into the open desert toward the shimmering city glow.
